mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, task_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, procinst_name, procinst_key, operator_id, operator_name, operator_org_id, operator_org_name, operator_dept_id, operator_dept_name
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_ru_task_operate_log (gmt_create, task_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, procinst_name, procinst_key, operator_id, operator_name, operator_org_id, operator_org_name, operator_dept_id, operator_dept_name) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procinstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procinstKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update t_wf_ru_task_operate_log set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, task_desc = #{taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, procinst_name = #{procinstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, procinst_key = #{procinstKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_id = #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_name = #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_org_id = #{operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_org_name = #{operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_dept_id = #{operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator_dept_name = #{operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_ru_task_operate_log (gmt_create, task_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, procinst_name, procinst_key, operator_id, operator_name, operator_org_id, operator_org_name, operator_dept_id, operator_dept_name) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procinstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procinstKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select max(id) as maxid from t_wf_ru_task_operate_log
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_ru_task_operate_log (id, gmt_create, task_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, procinst_name, procinst_key, operator_id, operator_name, operator_org_id, operator_org_name, operator_dept_id, operator_dept_name) values ((select a.id+1 from (select max(id) id from t_wf_ru_task_operate_log) a), #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procinstName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procinstKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
